steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage explains that evidence “was deliberately destroyed.” This is the direct reason we “are unlikely to ever have ______ account” of Hatshepsut's reign.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
An “exhaustive” account is thorough and complete in all significant details. When evidence is destroyed, we cannot achieve such comprehensiveness—we're missing crucial information.

Superficial, imaginative, and questionable don't describe what evidence destruction prevents.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
